MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB Atlas connection string. Get yours at https://cloud.mongodb.com

VOYAGE_API_KEY.description: Voyage AI API key for generating memory embeddings. Get yours at https://dash.voyageai.com/api-keys

AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY.description: Vercel AI Gateway API key for routing LLM requests. Get yours at https://vercel.com/docs/ai-gateway

AI_MODEL.description: AI model name to use (optional). Defaults to google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
